330→ # Extract content from <details> structure 331→ # The plan-body block uses <strong> tags in summary (not <code>) 332→ # Accept both <details> and <details open> 333→ pattern = r"<details(?:\s+open)?>\s*<summary>.*?</summary>\s*(.*?)\s*</details>" 334→ match = re.search(pattern, block.body, re.DOTALL) 335→ if match: 336→ return match.group(1).strip() 337→ 338→ # Fall back to old format (backward compatibility) 339→ pattern = r"<!-- erk:plan-content -->\s*(.*?)\s*<!-- /erk:plan-content -->" 340→ match = re.search(pattern, comment_body, re.DOTALL) 341→ 342→ if match is None: 343→ return None 344→ 345→ return match.group(1).strip() 346→ 347→ 348→def update_plan_header_dispatch( 349→ issue_body: str, 350→ run_id: str, 351→ node_id: str, 352→ dispatched_at: str, 353→) -> str: 354→ """Update dispatch fields in plan-header metadata block. 355→ 356→ Uses Python YAML parsing for robustness (not regex). 357→ This function reads the existing plan-header block, updates the 358→ dispatch fields, and re-renders the entire body. 359→

**Error Location:** `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/plan_header.py:188:9`
**Issue:** The `lifecycle_stage` parameter is being passed as `str | None`, but the `PlanHeaderData` dataclass expects `Literal["prompted", "planning", "planned", "impl"] | None`.
The type checker detected a type mismatch where a string variable is being passed to a parameter that requires a specific literal union type. agentId: ac7ee68537564adcb (use SendMessage with to: 'ac7ee68537564adcb' to continue this agent) <usage>total_tokens: 13671 tool_uses: 1 duration_ms: 6785</usage>

The ruff linter found 4 unused import errors in `/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/plan_header.py`:
